title: Terminal Screen Repair V2 Implementation Plan

pre_commit_gate.cmd: npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

tasks.title: Add screen-repair WebSocket protocol types
tasks.notes: Protocol must include clientAtBottom, clientBufferType, bufferType in response, screen-repair:ready, and screen-repair:failed. Do not reuse ScreenSnapshotMessage.data for repair payload.

rollback.command: 1. Remove screen-repair related interfaces from server/src/types/ws-protocol.ts. 2. Remove the matching frontend type additions from frontend/src/types/ws-protocol.ts.

tasks.title: Create viewport-only headless repair payload generator
tasks.notes: Repair payload generation must use active viewport buffer lines and cell attributes. Do not use SerializeAddon.serialize({ scrollback: 0 }) as the repair patch source. Include SGR color/style, cursor metadata, and active buffer type tests.

rollback.command: 1. Remove serializeHeadlessScreenRepair from server/src/utils/headlessTerminal.ts. 2. Remove getScreenRepair and related tests from server/src/services/SessionManager.ts and server/src/test-runner.ts.

tasks.title: Add WsRouter screen-repair lifecycle
tasks.notes: screen-repair pending must be separate from screen-snapshot replay pending. ACK success, screen-repair:failed, ACK timeout, and repair queue overflow must preserve output order. Do not reuse the current replay appendQueuedOutput tail-trim helper for repair; overflow must abort repair and flush queued plus current output without silent truncation. stale tokens must not flush.

rollback.command: 1. Remove screen-repair cases and helper methods from server/src/ws/WsRouter.ts. 2. Remove repair pending state tests from server/src/test-runner.ts while leaving legacy repair-replay tests unchanged.

tasks.title: Add TerminalView screen repair apply API
tasks.notes: Add getScreenRepairReadiness and applyScreenRepair. Request and apply must reject/defer IME, input capture, user scrollback, geometry mismatch, and buffer mismatch. applyScreenRepair must not call term.reset, replaceWithSnapshot, scrollToBottom, or snapshot cache update.

rollback.command: 1. Remove applyScreenRepair from TerminalHandle and useImperativeHandle in frontend/src/components/Terminal/TerminalView.tsx. 2. Remove related debug event names.

tasks.title: Switch TerminalContainer grid repair to screen-repair
tasks.notes: Do not skip repair permanently when lastResizeRef is absent; use TerminalView geometry/readiness or defer until geometry exists. Wire manual, workspace, and resize reasons. Suppress duplicate automatic screen-repair requests for same session/cols/rows/reason while preserving manual repair availability. Send screen-repair:failed on apply failure.

acceptance_tests.cmd: npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

rollback.command: 1. Restore requestRepairReplay naming and repair-replay send path in frontend/src/components/Terminal/TerminalContainer.tsx. 2. Remove screen repair message handlers added by this task.

tasks.title: Pass screen-repair messages through WebSocket context

rollback.command: 1. Remove onScreenRepair and onScreenRepairRejected from SessionHandlers. 2. Remove screen repair cases from frontend/src/contexts/WebSocketContext.tsx.

tasks.title: Add server repair protocol regression tests
tasks.notes: Tests must cover viewport-only bounds, no scrollback marker, SGR color/style, cursor metadata, alternate buffer mismatch, degraded reject, ACK flush, failed flush, timeout flush, repair queue overflow abort without tail trim, stale token, replay-pending reject, and legacy repair-replay isolation.

rollback.command: 1. Remove newly added screen repair tests from server/src/test-runner.ts. 2. Remove test registry entries for those functions.

tasks.title: Update grid repair Playwright coverage
tasks.notes: E2E must assert resize before screen-repair, no screen-snapshot during Grid/workspace repair, no repair-replay from Grid paths, duplicate automatic resize and screen-repair suppression, and resize reason repair after tile resize.

acceptance_tests.cmd: npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

rollback.command: 1. Revert only the screen-repair expectation changes in frontend/tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts. 2. Keep unrelated Equal mode tests untouched.

tasks.title: Add long scrollback repair E2E guard
tasks.notes: Long scrollback E2E must assert bounded viewportRows, bufferType/cursor metadata, scrollback preservation, visible tail preservation, no screen-snapshot, no repair-replay, and request-side defer while user is scrolled up.

acceptance_tests.cmd: npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"
npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

rollback.command: 1. Remove TC-6620 and helper additions from frontend/tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts. 2. Leave TC-6611 through TC-6616 changes in place unless the protocol rollback is also being performed.

tasks.title: Run final validation gates and review changed contracts

npm --prefix frontend exec playwright test tests/e2e/grid-equal-mode.spec.ts --project "Desktop Chrome"

rollback.command: Plan artifact only. Implementation rollback is handled by the owning task rollback entries.
